brief_justification: Agent arrives at Day 11 vs the correct Day 29, but faithfully followed the stated model — wrong answer, sound mechanical approach; agent iterates the formula step by step with no deeper analysis of steady-state behavior or why the inventory depletes at a given rate; no questioning of assumptions, rounding errors, or whether 0.917 approximation compounds to a meaningful error; no cross-check from a closed-form solution or boundary-condition test performed; uses '~' notation suggesting mild approximation awareness but presents the final answer with full confidence and no uncertainty framing; only the direct iterative table approach is used with no mention of alternatives like the closed-form recurrence solution; the day-by-day table provides a complete, reproducible derivation chain that a third party could fully retrace.
